value.author: lane-a-subagent-20260614
value.text:
Lane A src-coverage evidence update.

What changed:
- Extended `tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts` to cover additional register-operation and register-setup edge paths without adding new spec files:
  - dependency-failed exit behavior when linked-test runs set `fail_on_skipped_triggered`
  - extension/package lifecycle routing for adopt/adopt-all/activate/deactivate
  - package install path normalization when no explicit target is provided
  - doctor strict-exit behavior when summary status is `ok`
- Extended `tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts` to cover malformed `inputSchema.required` fallback handling in `buildMcpToolContracts`.

Verification run:
1) `node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts`
   - PASS: 2 files, 69 tests.
2) `CI=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage -- --coverage.thresholds.lines=0 --coverage.thresholds.branches=0 --coverage.thresholds.functions=0 --coverage.thresholds.statements=0`
   - PASS: 158 files, 3388 tests.

Measured `src/**/*.ts` coverage delta (full-suite probe, thresholds disabled):
- lines: 97.99% -> 98.00% (covered +4)
- branches: 91.63% -> 91.64% (covered +1)
- functions: 97.69% -> 97.78% (covered +4)
- statements: 97.72% -> 97.74% (covered +4)

Targeted file deltas:
- `src/cli/register-setup.ts`: lines 92.17% -> 95.65%, functions 77.77% -> 88.88%
- `src/mcp/tool-definitions.ts`: branches 66.66% -> 100%

value.text:
Lane A wave2 strict all-source push (targeted hotspot branch lift).

What changed:
- Extended tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts with expanded option-path coverage for test/test-all/stats/health/validate/contracts, plus docs mutation and close fallback branches.
- Extended tests/unit/schema-command.spec.ts with add-type/add-status human-format branch tests, case-insensitive alias show coverage, and wrapped non-Error parser/remover failure coverage.
- Extended tests/unit/history-activity-command.spec.ts with history-redact type-path migration coverage (task -> custom type folder move).
- Extended tests/unit/history-repair-command.spec.ts with unknown-author fallback/default-message coverage and rollback branch when history snapshot is unavailable.

Landed: new tests/unit/lane-a/pure-helpers-wave1.spec.ts + extended existing src specs (cli-main-errors, determinism, get-append-command, linked-test-parsers, migration-gates, mutation-projection, runtime-registrations, search-corpus, sentry-helpers, structure-exports, test-command). Orchestrator verified the suite is green after fixing 2 cut-off-left broken specs.

value.author: cov-krwu-subagent-20260615
value.text:
Follow-up regression fixes + verification:
- tests/unit/test-runs-command.spec.ts: stabilized linked-progress fallback assertion in the non-progress stderr branch by asserting final run status instead of a chunk-order-sensitive linked_test_index value.
- tests/unit/mcp-server-branch-residual.spec.ts: made dynamic custom-action branches deterministic with explicit withTempPmPath() path injection; also restore PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT after each test to prevent cross-suite env leakage.

Verification runs (2026-06-15):
1) pnpm vitest run tests/unit/test-runs-command.spec.ts tests/integration/help-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/mcp-server-branch-residual.spec.ts tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts
   -> PASS (4 files, 155 tests).
2) pnpm vitest run --coverage.enabled true --coverage.provider v8 --coverage.reporter text --coverage.reporter json --coverage.reportsDirectory .vitest-coverage/pm-krwu-full-final --coverage.thresholds.* 0 --coverage.include <17 pm-krwu files>
   -> PASS (217 files, 4162 tests), coverage summary: Statements 100% (5586/5586), Branches 100% (4612/4612), Functions 100% (939/939), Lines 100% (5388/5388).
3) pm test pm-krwu --run --progress --match "tests/unit/test-runs-command.spec.ts tests/integration/help-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/mcp-server-branch-residual.spec.ts tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts"
   -> PASS (linked-test index 7).
